name: HoldLens Public JSON API
auth: None — public, free, rate-limited at the CDN edge

endpoints.desc: This catalog
All 94 tickers ranked by ConvictionScore
Single ticker with full breakdown
Top 100 buy signals sorted desc
Top 100 sell signals sorted asc
All 30 tracked superinvestors
Single manager with holdings + recent moves
Top 100 conviction × position-size ranked bets
8Q × 12-sector signed net-flow heatmap
Per-sector tickers + top owners + 4Q flow drilldown
Top 200 high-impact 13F moves (>5% portfolio shift), sorted by impact
Widely-held + bullish + net-buying tickers — what smart money agrees on
Top 30 by ownership with loading/unwinding/stable flow tag
Tickers where ≥2 managers buying AND ≥2 selling, last 4Q — the debate signal
Managers ranked by top-1 / top-3 / top-5 position concentration
Top 300 full-exit 13F moves ranked by size of the bet that just ended
All manager pairs with shared topHoldings — Jaccard similarity matrix
Top 50 buy candidates
Top 50 smart-money buy signals for value overlays
Available 13F quarters
